title: Regional bridge and next expedition phase
summary: Sixty-fourth structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-1 wave bridges the broader regional journey and the next expedition through existing season and travel seams, then adds one small next-expedition follow-on.

execution_order.why_now: The season shell is ready to connect the broader regional journey to the next chapter.
Existing season and travel seams can carry more chapter linkage without shell growth.
The world should feel more linked, not more crowded.
A small follow-on can make the next expedition feel present without opening early.
The station should stay future-facing without becoming noisy.
The future chapter should feel present but not prematurely active.

guardrails: Do not add another station page.
Do not open a second live expedition card early.
Reuse existing routes, expedition, journal, and map framing.
acceptance_focus: The broader regional journey feels more chapter-linked.
The next expedition feels present without noise.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-1.md, docs/reports/2026-04-02-regional-bridge-and-next-expedition-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 1's later long-push wave after the stop-point work: bridge the broader regional journey and the next expedition through existing seams without opening another planning surface.
